one_time_description: Contribution to Windfarm Legacy Trust of $87,500,000 recorded as a non-recurring expense in the period
economic_notes: First Nation owns 100% of Nigig Power Corporation (wind energy GBE). Acquired additional 50% of HIW Property Holdings LP in March 2022 making it wholly controlled. Has 33.33% interest in Shwe Miikaan Limited Partnership (construction). Operates a gas bar and trailer park. Legal claim against First Nation and NPC for $173,197,700 relating to breach of contract.
notes: Fiscal year is 2022 (ended March 31, 2022). Large non-recurring item: $87,500,000 contribution to Windfarm Legacy Trust caused a net deficiency of $31,977,260 despite strong operating results. GBE (Nigig Power Corporation) reported share of income of $55,718,745 accounted for by modified equity method and not included in revenue line totals. Promissory note expense of $2,329,786 also recorded below operating line. Asset impairment of $636,699 on HIWP partnership interest. FNFA loan of $102.4M is the dominant liability. Net financial assets/net debt position not explicitly stated on face of statements; balance sheet data partially unavailable from provided text. Accounts receivable and current liabilities totals not extractable from provided text. num_subsidiaries includes: Key Harbour Settlement Trust, Adtores Properties GP Ltd., HIW Property Holdings LP, HIW Property Holdings GP Inc., and Pickerel Contracting Limited.
